collection_guide_text: Any equipment you have obtained at least once is recorded here and permanently increases your character’s base stats. The effect remains even if you clean up items in your inventory.
guide_collection_content:
■ Equipment Structure
- 7 rarities: Common, Magic, Rare, Legendary, Mythic, Transcendent, Eternal
- 3 slots: Weapon, Armor, Accessory

■ Collection Scale
- Each set contains 21 equipment items.
- Currently: 5 sets, for a total of 105 collectible items.

■ Mastery Bonus
- Collect equipment and increase mastery levels to gain permanent stat bonuses.
- Reaching Eternal mastery can amplify bonuses up to 9×.
guide_collection_detail_body:
• Each rarity has a separate collection slot, even for the same equipment. Every acquisition increases its count.
• 1 acquired: Unlock → 10 acquired: Enhanced → 50 acquired: ★ Master
• At ★ Master, Normal rarity grants up to 3× its base effect, while Eternal rarity grants up to 9×.
• Collection progress remains after selling or auto-selling equipment. Set bonuses activate once each required slot has been acquired at least once.
guide_collection_max_bonus_title: Permanent Bonuses for Mastering All 105 Slots
guide_collection_max_bonus_line2: Item Drop Rate +34% · Gold Gain +29.5% · EXP Gain +25% · Critical Rate +13.7%

helpEquipmentRaritySubtitle: Higher rarity means more bonus options and a higher base stat multiplier. Equip better gear from your inventory.
helpStatsCombatSubtitle: Gold upgrades and gear combine for your final stats. Below is how each stat affects combat and rewards.
guideWelcome: Core rules of Focus RPG, organized by topic. Scroll down to read more.
guideDailyGemsBullet1: You receive base gems on your first login each day; after 5 consecutive successful focus streaks you earn bonus gems.
guideDailyGemsBullet2: Monthly Immersion Pass owners and users who purchased ad removal can earn additional special daily rewards.
guideSecRarityIntro: Weapons, armor, and accessories gain more bonus options and a higher base stat multiplier as rarity goes up. Equip better pieces from your inventory to grow stronger.
guideRarityRareDesc: Two bonus options for more build variety.
guideRarityLegendaryDesc: Three bonus options for strong combinations.
guideRarityMythicDesc: Four bonus options—aim for top-tier builds.
guideRarityTranscendentDesc: Beyond mythic. 4–5 bonus options + a unique Focus reward bonus (+15–25%).
guideRarityEternalDesc: The pinnacle. 6 bonus options + a unique effect (Ignore DEF or +50% critical damage).
guideRarityGrowthMagic: About 1.5x stats vs the previous tier
guideRarityGrowthRare: About 2x stats vs the previous tier
guideRarityGrowthLegendary: About 2.5x stats vs the previous tier
guideRarityGrowthMythic: About 3x stats vs the previous tier (explosive growth)
guideRarityGrowthTranscendent: About 4x stats vs the previous tier (limit break)
guideRarityGrowthEternal: About 5x stats vs the previous tier (absolute god stats)
guide_fragment_drop_info: 💡 Source: Honor Path rewards, or an ultra-rare drop from bosses on floor 300+ (drop rate rises as you climb higher floors!)
guideSecStatsIntro: Permanent gold upgrades on the character screen stack with equipment to form your final stats.
guideStatHpBody: HP drains from focus fatigue during a session. At 0 HP combat stops, but the focus timer still counts to the end. Higher HP lets you last longer.
guideStatAtkBody: Base damage to monsters. Higher ATK means faster kills, quicker floors, and better reward pacing.
guideStatDefBody: Reduces HP lost per second from fatigue. More DEF makes long sessions easier to survive.
guideStatSpdBody: Attack cadence. Higher SPD means more hits in the same time—huge for clear speed.
guideStatLukBody: Influences crit chance and luck-based drops/rewards. Good LUK can mean bigger hits or richer drops.
guideStatFocusBody: Resistance to focus fatigue. Higher values slow HP drain during long focus sessions.
guideFocusCombatBody:
When you start a focus session, the timer runs for the duration you chose. Auto-combat runs in the background: defeating monsters can raise your floor and grant rewards.

If HP hits 0, combat pauses but focus continues. Potions or other effects may let you re-enter combat depending on the game version.

Battery saver mode may slow combat update frequency to save power.
guidePotionBody:
Potions restore a fraction of your max HP—not a flat number. Whether your max HP is high or low, the same portion of the HP bar fills.

When max HP grows, the absolute heal grows with it for the same ratio, so bar-based balance stays consistent as you progress.

Auto-potions trigger when current HP falls below a set fraction of max HP. You can toggle auto-use and adjust the threshold in settings.
guideWeeklyBody:
Weekly focus time and related stats are tracked per UTC ISO week. Check the ranking screen for the weekly focus leaderboard.

Weekly rewards are delivered to your mailbox after settlement, and gems are paid out by rank/bracket for the **top 50%** only.
- 1st: 800💎
- 2nd–3rd: 400💎
- 4th–10th: 100💎
- 11th–30th: 50💎
- Top 31–50%: 20💎
- 51%+: No reward
guideForgeEnhanceDownPre: From +4 on, a failed attempt can make the level
guideForgeEnhanceWarnPre: Mythic gear at +7 or higher: on failure, the item may be
guideForgeEnhanceWarnPost: . (Use an anti-shatter scroll if you like your gear.)
guideForgeSynthesisIntro: Stack same-rarity gear to climb one tier—like a mini ascension ritual, with paperwork.
guideForgeSynthesisWarnPre: Legendary → Mythic can fail. If it does, your material gear will be
guideSynthesisBody:
In your inventory, consume **5 Legendary** items of the same slot (weapon/armor/accessory) and pay **100 gems** to craft **1 Mythic** item of the same slot.

Only **unlocked** Legendary items can be used as materials.
On success, the crafted Mythic item is added to your inventory.
guideCollectionIntro: Every piece of gear you obtain is permanently registered in the Collection. Even if you sell or destroy it from the inventory, the Collection bonus stays forever.
guideCollectionSlotsBody: 5 weapons + 5 armors + 5 accessories = 15 base equipment, each across 7 rarities (Common · Magic · Rare · Legendary · Mythic · Transcendent · Eternal). The full grid is 105 slots.
guideCollectionBonusBody: Each unlocked slot adds a permanent % bonus to ATK / DEF / HP and more. Acquiring the same item again raises its [Mastery Count], strengthening the bonus further.
guideCollectionCoreSetBody: Collect Common · Magic · Rare · Legendary · Mythic of one theme (e.g. Beginner Set) to complete the Core Set and unlock theme-specific special bonuses (Gold / EXP / Drop / Crit).
guideCollectionMasterSetBody: Add Transcendent and Eternal on top of the Core Set to complete the Master Set, layering an additional special bonus roughly 2× the Core Set on top.
guideCollectionMasteryCallout: Master a single Eternal item 50 times to obtain a permanent Collection bonus 9× stronger than mastering a Common item.
guideHighRarityIntro: Two ultimate rarities above Mythic. Drops are extreme (0.01% / 0.001%), but their Collection bonus and stats are overwhelming.
guideTranscendentBlockBody: A crimson rarity wreathed in pulsing blood-red aura. 5 option slots, ~3.3× the stats of Mythic. The icon trembles with a subtle shake and a pulsing border.
guideEternalBlockBody: The pinnacle rarity, scattering diamond-silver stardust. 6 option slots, ~10.8× the stats of Mythic. A SweepGradient rainbow shimmer symbolizes infinity.
guideSynthesisFragmentHeading: Fragment System — Failure is guaranteed progress
guideSynthesisFragmentBody: Even when probabilistic synthesis fails (Mythic→Transcendent 30% / Transcendent→Eternal 10%), you receive 1 [Transcendent Fragment] / [Eternal Fragment]. Failure is not loss — it is guaranteed progress toward your next craft.
guideSynthesisEternalMercifulBody: When Eternal synthesis with 3 Transcendent items fails, only 1 material is destroyed — the other 2 return to your inventory.

refineDialogDesc:
The option type stays the same; only its value is re-rolled.
Normal polish may lower the value.
Safe polish uses gems; if the new value is lower, the current value is kept.
refineNormalDesc: Gold + polish stone / value may drop
refineSafeDesc: Gold + polish stone + gems / value never drops
shopRefineStone1Desc: Core material consumed during option value polish.
shopRefineStoneSmallDesc: Bundle of 10 polish stones. Only 27 gems each.
shopRefineStoneMediumDesc: Bundle of 30 polish stones. ~26.7 gems each — best value.
refineStoneShortConfirm: Not enough option polish stones 🪨. Replace the {short} missing stone(s) with 30 gems each ({gems} gems)?
refineResultKept: A lower value was rolled, so the current value ({value}) was kept.
refineHelpBody:
Option polish re-rolls only the value of an equipment option while keeping its type.
Normal polish uses gold and option polish stones; the value may go up or down.
Safe polish uses gold, polish stones, and gems; if the new value is lower than the current one, the current value is kept.
Option values are randomly determined within fixed ranges.
ATK %: 4% ~ 20%
SPD %: 5% ~ 20%
HP %: 8% ~ 20%
LUK %: 8% ~ 20%
Gold gain: 5% ~ 20%
EXP gain: 3% ~ 20%
ATK flat: 10 ~ 80
DEF flat: 10 ~ 80
HP flat: 50 ~ 500
※ For Transcendent rarity and above, the upper limit expands based on grade.
When short on stones, each missing stone can be replaced with 30 gems.
convertDialogDesc:
The option type changes to a different option.
The previous value is not kept; a new value is rolled for the new option.
Options already on this equipment will not appear again.
convertNormalDesc: Gold + conversion stone / random type change
convertAdvancedDesc: Gold + conversion stone + gems / higher value range
shopOptionConversionStone1Desc: Material used to change an option's type.
convertStoneShortConfirm: Not enough conversion stones 🎲. A total of {gems} gems will be spent including replacements. Continue?
convertHelpBody:
Option conversion changes the selected option to a different option type. The previous value is not kept; a new value is rolled for the new option. Options already on this equipment will not appear again.
Advanced conversion uses gems and rolls the new option from a higher value range while excluding duplicates.
(Example: Normal ATK 4–20% ➡️ Advanced 12–20% range)
optionConversionRarityUnavailable: Option conversion is not available for this rarity.

firestoreHoFMigrationPermissionDenied:
Firestore permission-denied
{msg}

This migration lists **all** `users` and writes other users' `users`, `public_profiles`, and `leaderboards/.../rankings` docs. Typical "own document only" rules always deny it.

Fix:
1) Mirror `lib/config/operator_firebase_uids.dart` in Firestore rules with `request.auth.uid == '…'` (see firebase/hall_of_fame_migration_permission_fix.txt).
2) Or use custom claim `admin: true` and `request.auth.token.admin == true` in rules.
3) Or run the migration from Cloud Functions with the Admin SDK.

See: firebase/hall_of_fame_migration_permission_fix.txt
statHpDescription:
HP: Your survivability.
If HP reaches 0 during focus, combat stops but the focus timer still counts.
Higher HP lets you last longer.

Gold HP upgrades cost more than other stat upgrades at the same stage by design. Potions heal a percentage of max HP, so raising max HP also increases the absolute HP restored by the same potion—boosting survival and recovery broadly.
(Cost multipliers/curves may be tuned via live configuration.)
statAtkDescription:
ATK: Base damage dealt to monsters.
Higher ATK reduces time to kill and speeds up floor progression.

Defeat monsters faster to reach higher floors and earn bonus rewards!
statDefDescription:
DEF: Reduces focus damage (fatigue).
Higher DEF reduces HP loss per second.
statSpdDescription:
SPD: Determines how often you attack.
Higher SPD means more attacks per second, leading to much faster floor progression.
statLukDescription:
LUK: Affects critical hit chance and item drop rate.
Higher LUK can deal 2× damage or earn more gold.
statFocusDescription:
FOCUS: A special stat unique to our game.
Increases resistance to focus damage (fatigue).
Higher FOCUS lets you survive longer with slower HP drain.
guideHpGoldUpgradeNote: 💡 Gold HP upgrade cost: Potions heal a fixed ratio of max HP, so higher max HP means the same potion restores more HP in absolute terms. That broader impact is why HP upgrades are priced higher than other stats; multipliers/curves can be tuned remotely.
settingsAutoPotionDescription:
During a focus session, if HP drops to 30% of max or below, one potion is used to restore 50% of max HP.
If you have no potions, an emergency purchase prompt may appear.
When off, potions are not used automatically. This setting is saved and synced to the cloud.
autoPotionFirstFocusDialogBody:
While focusing, if this option is on, a potion may be used automatically when your HP gets low.

• When: HP at or below 30% of max
• Uses: 1 potion
• Heals: 50% of max HP
• If you have no potions, an emergency purchase dialog may appear.

To turn this off: Settings → Focus Environment → disable “Auto-use potions.”
focusCombatRestSubtitle: Combat paused. Only the focus timer is running.
focusRewardCombatCollapsedBanner: You stopped fighting after exhaustion from battle. (Tower climb bonus & combat completion rewards excluded.)

focusFirstTimeSheetBody: You can close the app, send it to the background, or even power off your phone—focus time is still measured accurately and rewards are paid in full. Focus on what matters with peace of mind.

focusCombatLimitDialogBody:
At 0 HP, combat and tower bonuses won't count toward completion rewards for this session.
The focus timer still runs to the end; EXP and gold on complete are based on focus time only.
💡 You can still level up with the base EXP rewards.

settingsDevStatSquishConfirm:
Only users matching the in-app squish thresholds are updated (low-level accounts are skipped).

· Ratio-squish level, tower floors, gold, and base stats.
· Writes gold stat upgrade counters (atk/def/spd/luk/focus/hp*, etc.) to 0 (stat-reset refund abuse).
· Does not change equipment levels — use the separate “Gear levels only” button for that.
· Same as before: users, public_profiles, leaderboards, HoF rebuild, optional apology mail.

One-time admin action. Continue?
settingsDevEquipmentSquishConfirm:
Scans all user documents. Does not change level, floors, gold, or stat upgrades.

Only scales every equipped/inventory/temp-storage equipment level by ~/10 (min 1).
Users whose gear is already at level 1 everywhere are skipped (no write).

Use after stat squish when you only need to fix gear. Continue?
settingsDevGoldUpgradeZeroConfirm:
Scans all users. Does not change level, floors, gold, or gear.

Sets gold stat upgrade counters (atk/def/spd/luk/focus/hpUpgradeLevel, etc.) to 0 and rebuilds baseStats from the current character level (removes upgrade bumps baked into saved stats).

Skips users who already have all counters at 0.
Use after stat squish if old counts would refund huge gold on gem stat reset. Continue?
settingsDevResetAllComboConfirm:
Sets only consecutiveSuccess to 0 on every users document.
Level, floors, EXP, and other fields are not modified. Continue?
settingsLogoutGuestWarning:
Logging out as guest disconnects this anonymous account from cloud and rankings.

Signing in with Google only afterward (without linking first) may create a new account, so progress may not carry over.

We recommend linking your Google account below before logging out.
settingsCheatFullResetBody:
Your character will be reset to a new account.
- Level 1, 0 EXP
- Starting gold 1,000
- 100 potions
- All stat upgrades reset
- Equipment and inventory cleared

This cannot be undone!
mvpQuoteWinnerOnlySubtitle: A message of glory — only last week’s winner can write here.
mvpQuoteFieldHintEditable: e.g. I’ll give my best again next week!
developerToolsDisabledBody: Developer tools are disabled in this build.
territoryHelpDesc1:
🛡️ What is the Abyssal Outpost?
A stronghold established deep within the Abyss. Securing this outpost automatically generates Gold over time, even while you are offline.
territoryHelpDesc2:
▲ Outpost Expansion
Reach higher floors and accumulate focus time to evolve your base to the next tier. As the tier increases, your hourly Gold production boosts exponentially.
territoryHelpDesc3:
💡 Vault Claiming Tips
Generated Gold is stored in the vault for up to 24 hours. Once the vault is full, Gold stops accumulating. Visit daily to harvest your Gold!
rankingShareCardPromoEarly: From level 10, combat power is highlighted on your share card.
rankingShareCardPromoRich: Combat power and weekly rank badges are shown on this card.

weekly_boss_guide.section_1_title: 1. ⚔️ A server-wide Boss appears from Friday evening through Sunday night.
weekly_boss_guide.section_1_body:
No separate entry needed. Focus 10+ minutes on weekends and damage applies automatically.
All players share the world boss ({max_hp} HP) in real time.
weekly_boss_guide.section_1_timezone_body: ⏰ Raid Period: Friday 09:00 UTC ~ Sunday 15:00 UTC
weekly_boss_guide.section_2_body:
Rankings are based on the [total damage dealt] over the weekend. Boss damage depends heavily on both your focus time and character stats.

The most critical factor is your [Highest Tower Floor]. Climbing higher allows you to deal significantly more damage to the weekend boss.
weekly_boss_guide.section_2_factors: 💡 Damage Influence: Highest Tower Floor > ATK Upgrade > Character Level
weekly_boss_guide.section_3_body: Rewards depend on whether the server clears {max_hp} HP by Monday dawn settlement.
weekly_boss_guide.reward_success_title: 🏆 If the Boss is Defeated (Final Rank Rewards)
weekly_boss_guide.reward_fail_title: 💀 If the Boss Is Not Defeated (HP Remains)
weekly_boss_guide.reward_fail_body: If the Boss is not defeated within the time limit, all ranking rewards become unavailable. All participating players will receive only the shared consolation reward.

artifactLabSubtitle: Forge and upgrade artifacts with tower shards.
artifactHelpContent:
Artifacts provide powerful, permanent passive stat boosts to your character.

[How to Get Artifact Shards]
1. Tower Milestone Rewards: Earn large amounts upon reaching specific milestones (50F, 100F, 200F, etc.) for the first time in the Infinite Tower. (Automatically claimed upon entering the Artifact Lab).
2. Focus Rewards: Successfully complete a focus session of 60+ minutes while having reached 100F+ to receive shards (Max 10 per day, +1 shard per session).

[Crafting & Upgrading]
- Artifacts unlock when you reach their required tower floor.
- Crafting and upgrading artifacts requires both Artifact Shards and Gold.
artifactDescLuck: Boosts gold gain, luck and drop rate.
artifactDescFocus: Increases focus rewards and shard gain.
artifactErrorNotOwned: You don't own this artifact yet.

dungeon_desc:
Earn bonus buffs ({min}~{max}%)
Boosts ATK, DEF, HP, combat damage, and focus completion rewards (gold & EXP)!

buff_storage_rule_desc: Clear the dungeon to store Focus Bonuses

buff_storage_empty: 0% Buff — Clear dungeons to earn up to {maxBuff}% buff!
buff_storage_full: Focus Bonus Storage is full. Your highest bonus will be applied automatically on your next focus session.
buff_storage_rule_simple: Play the dungeon to build up bonuses. They apply automatically when your next focus session starts.

dungeon_result_practice_desc: Practice Mode does not count rewards or records.
dungeon_result_no_reward_practice: No rewards were given in Practice Mode
dungeon_result_buff_storage_full: Bonus Storage is full, so the new bonus could not be saved
dungeon_reward_guide_desc: In Real Mode, the farther you go, the higher your guaranteed Gold, bonus equipment box chance, and next Focus Bonus become.
dungeon_reward_guide_notice: Bonus equipment boxes are chance-based rewards. Even if no box appears, you still receive guaranteed Gold and a Focus Bonus.
dungeon_reward_guide_box_rule: You can earn up to 1 equipment box per run.
dungeon_reward_guide_practice_notice: Practice Mode does not give rewards, buffs, or official records.
dungeon_energy_guide_how:
Earn energy by completing focus sessions.
(10 min: 1 / 25 min: 2 / 60+ min: 3)
dungeon_energy_guide_limit: You can earn up to 3 energy per day. The daily limit resets at midnight.
dungeon_energy_guide_keep: You can store up to 5 energy. Energy does not expire and will carry over to the next day.
dungeon_energy_guide_warning: You cannot earn more energy if your storage is full (5). Be sure to spend your energy in the dungeon!
dungeon_reward_tier_2_desc: 3,000 Gold · Magic 18% · Rare 5% · Legendary 0.3% · Focus Bonus +{buff}%
dungeon_reward_tier_3_desc: 4,000 Gold · Magic 25% · Rare 10% · Legendary 1.5% · Mythic 0.1% · Focus Bonus +{buff}%
dungeon_reward_tier_4_desc: 5,000 Gold · Magic 30% · Rare 15% · Legendary 3% · Mythic 0.25% · Transcendent 0.01% · Focus Bonus +{buff}%
dungeon_reward_tier_5_desc: 6,000 Gold · Magic 35% · Rare 20% · Legendary 5% · Mythic 0.5% · Transcendent 0.03% · Focus Bonus +{buff}%
dungeon_box_chance_desc: Depending on your distance tier, you have a chance to earn a bonus equipment box.
dungeon_box_chance_none: Equipment boxes do not appear in this tier.
dungeon_box_chance_failed: No equipment box appeared this time. Try again on your next run!
dungeon_buff_guide_desc: Focus Bonuses earned in the dungeon are stored, and the highest one is automatically applied when your next focus session starts. While active, ATK, DEF, HP, and combat damage all increase, and your gold and EXP rewards upon completion are also boosted.
dungeon_buff_guide_limit: You can store up to 5 Focus Bonuses. Each one expires 6 hours after being earned.

guild_leave_confirm: After leaving, you cannot create or join a guild for 24 hours, chat access ends immediately, and your weekly contribution may remain as a past record.

guild_create_first: Be the first to create a guild!
guild_free_join_notice:
All guilds in Focus RPG currently operate on an "Instant Join (Free Join)" system without waiting for the Guild Master's approval.
The time spent "focusing" for your own growth is already a tough and lonely battle. When you find like-minded companions, we don't want your precious flow of focus to be interrupted or exhausted while waiting for the Guild Master to log in or approve your request.
Don't hesitate—join your companions with just one click! Enjoy guild benefits immediately upon joining, and achieve even greater growth together starting today.

💡 Detailed guild management features, such as applications, approvals, and rejections, will be supported in the future [Guild V2 Update] once users have fully settled into the guild system.

guideRarityDivineDesc: The ultimate creation meant only for those who have reached the realm of gods. 10 additional options + Unique options (Focus Multiplier +300% & Focus Efficiency +100%).

newbiePreviewD2Title: Tomorrow's reward is waiting for you
newbiePreviewD2Body: Log in tomorrow to claim your Day 2 reward. Finish today's focus and keep growing your character.
newbiePreviewD3Body: Day 3 brings special rewards for equipment enhancement. Finish today's focus and get ready for tomorrow.
newbiePreviewD5Body: Day 5 has an equipment reward ready for you. Complete today's focus and prepare to get stronger tomorrow.
newbiePreviewD7Title: 7-day completion reward is one day away
newbiePreviewD7Body: Just one more day and your 7-day completion reward unlocks. Finish today's focus and wrap up your first week.
trialTowerFocusSlogan: When you focus, the door within opens.
trialTowerFocusOnlyDescription: The Tower of Trials can only be challenged during a Focus session.
abyssPatternExecutionFailTooLate: Too late — defend just before the strike
abyssPatternExecutionTimingHint: Now! Defend just before the strike
abyssPowerNotice: In the Abyss Tower, pattern timing matters more than raw power. High power gives only a slight edge.

abyssLobbyTraitHint1: Even low combat power can clear with precise pattern responses.
abyssLobbyTraitHint2: High combat power helps a little, but does not guarantee victory.

pushRetentionD1Body: You haven't focused a single hour today. The character you built yesterday is waiting just for you. Log in now and claim your daily rewards!
pushRetentionD2Body: Your gear and rewards have been waiting for you for days. Jump back in now and sweep up all that missed focus loot!

newbieRetentionD7RewardD2PreviewTitle: Log in for 7 days to get guaranteed Legendary Gear!
newbieRetentionD7RewardD2PreviewBody:
On Day 7, you can claim a Legendary Gear Chest and 20 Gems.
Come back tomorrow to unlock your Day 2 reward.
newbieRetentionD7RewardD6PreviewBody:
On Day 7, you can claim a Legendary Gear Chest and 20 Gems.
Come back one more day to receive your guaranteed reward.
newbieRetentionD7RewardClaimTitle: Your Legendary Gear reward is here!
newbieRetentionD7RewardClaimBody: Claim your Legendary Gear Chest and 20 Gems now.
abyssTrial2Description: A new trial of 5-direction defense, memory patterns, false telegraphs, rapid mashing, and a final combo.
abyssTrial2OpenSoon: A new trial will open soon.
abyssDirectionBlueHint: A blue marker means the opposite direction
abyssDirectionBlackHint: A black marker fails if pressed
abyssDirectionStopHint: Stop attacking, then input the direction
abyssTrial2GuideLine2: Press the buttons in the order shown by the boss.
abyssTrial2GuideLine3: Blue marks mean the opposite direction, and black marks must not be pressed.
guildWeeklyRewardHelpBody:
1. Requirements & Rules
• You must deal damage to the Guild Weekly Boss at least once (otherwise you are excluded from both Boss and Focus rewards)
• All eligible members receive the base reward based on the guild's rank
• The Top 1-3 contributors (by damage / focus time) within the guild receive an additional bonus

2. Guild Boss Ranking Rewards (base reward for all / bonus for guild Top 1-3)
• 1st: Downgrade Protection x1, Destruction Protection x1, Option Conversion Stone x5 (Bonus: Destruction Protection x1, Conversion Stone x3)
• 2nd-3rd: Destruction Protection x1, Conversion Stone x3 (Bonus: Conversion Stone x2)
• 4th-10th: Conversion Stone x2 (No bonus)
• All Participants: Conversion Stone x1 (No bonus)

3. Guild Focus Ranking Rewards (base reward for all / bonus for guild Top 1-3)
• 1st: Gems 300, Blessed Enhancement Scroll x1, Option Polish Stone x10, Upgrade Scroll x20 (Bonus: Gems 200, Polish Stone x5, Upgrade Scroll x10)
• 2nd-3rd: Gems 150, Polish Stone x5, Upgrade Scroll x10 (Bonus: Gems 50, Polish Stone x2, Upgrade Scroll x5)
• 4th-10th: Gems 100, Polish Stone x3, Upgrade Scroll x5 (No bonus)
• All Participants: Gems 30, Upgrade Scroll x3 (No bonus)

4. Reset & Settlement Times (US Pacific Time)
• Guild Focus: Resets every Sunday at 1:00 PM → Reward paid the same day at 5:30 PM
• Guild Boss Damage: Resets immediately when the boss is defeated → Reward paid every Sunday at 9:00 AM
